flashcards.definition: Urban areas being warmer than surrounding rural areas due to concrete, asphalt, reduced vegetation, and waste heat.
Low-density, car-dependent suburban expansion that converts farmland and natural habitat.
Urban planning strategy: compact, walkable, mixed-use, transit-oriented development to reduce sprawl.
Roads, rooftops, and pavement that prevent water infiltration → increased runoff and flooding.
Movement of people from rural to urban areas; >56% of the world's population now lives in cities.
